steps.title: Restate the voting rule
steps.content: The first sentence says Malaysia uses a single-member plurality voting system. The next sentence explains what that means: candidates are elected when they receive a plurality, or greatest number, of votes.

steps.title: Reject non-restatements
steps.content: B suggests simultaneous events, C signals concession or contrast, and D adds another point. The second sentence is not a new event, contrast, or addition; it restates the meaning of the voting system just named. The answer is A.
